name: Westhaven Gold Corp.
description: Westhaven Gold Corp. is a gold and silver exploration and development company focused on the Shovelnose property in the Spences Bridge Gold Belt of southern British Columbia, covering approximately 41,634 hectares. A 2025 Preliminary Economic Assessment validated an 11-year underground gold mining opportunity, and in February 2026 the company closed a strategic earn-in agreement with Dundee Corporation for up to C$85 million in project expenditures.
